ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stars" (
  "star_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each star */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the star */,
  "mass_su" REAL /* Mass of the star in solar units */,
  "teff_k" REAL /* Effective temperature of the star in Kelvin */,
  "fe_h" REAL /* Metallicity of the star */,
  "age_gyrs" REAL /* Age of the star in billions of years */,
  "appar_mag" REAL /* Apparent magnitude of the star */,
  "distance_pc" REAL /* Distance to the star in parsecs */,
  "ra_hrs" REAL /* Right ascension of the star in hours */,
  "dec_deg" REAL /* Declination of the star in degrees */,
  "lum_su" REAL /* Luminosity of the star in solar units */,
  "rad_su" REAL /* Radius of the star in solar units */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exoplanet_star" (
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exoplanet */,
  "star_id" INTEGER /* ID of the star */,
  "discovery_year" INTEGER /* Year of the exoplanet's discovery */,
  "discovery_method" TEXT /* Method used to discover the exoplanet (e.g., Transit, Radial Velocity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exoplanet_id", "star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exoplanet_characteristics" (
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exoplanet */,
  "size_from_planet_deg" REAL /* Size of the exoplanet from the planet in degrees */,
  "no_planets" INTEGER /* Number of planets in the system */,
  "no_planets_hz" INTEGER /* Number of planets in the habitable zone */,
  "hab_zone_max_au" REAL /* Maximum distance from the star of the habitable zone in astronomical units */,
  "hzd" REAL /* Habitable zone distance */,
  "hzc" REAL /* Habitable zone classification */,
  "hza" REAL /* Habitable zone index */,
  "hz_i" REAL /* Habitable zone metric */,
  "sph" REAL /* Surface temperature habitability score */,
  "esi" REAL /* Earth similarity index */,
  "ice_cover" REAL /* Percentage of the exoplanet's surface covered by ice */,
  "ocean_cover" REAL /* Percentage of the exoplanet's surface covered by oceans */,
  "atm_comp" TEXT /* Composition of the exoplanet's atmosphere */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exoplanet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exoplanet_classification" (
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exoplanet */,
  "habitability_class" TEXT /* Class of the exoplanet's habitability (e.g., psychroplanet) */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Whether the exoplanet is confirmed */,
  "habitable" INTEGER /* Whether the exoplanet is habitable */,
  "habitable_moon" INTEGER /* Whether the exoplanet has a habitable moon */,
  "exoplanet_type" TEXT /* Type of the exoplanet (e.g., terrestrial, gas giant, ice giant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exoplanet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, research institution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the exoplanet data */,
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exoplanet being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the exoplanet data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_used" TEXT /* Query used to access the exoplanet data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exoplanet related to the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exoplanet_publications" (
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exoplanet */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exoplanet_id", "publication_id")
)
